```curt
check val = if val > 84 { err "limit" } else { val }

lines = fs.read "data.txt" ? "alice 10\nbob 30\ncarol 50"
entries = lines.lines | map line -> {
  parts = line.split " "
  name = parts[0]
  num = parts[1].int
  {name, num}
}

print "--- arithmetic ---"
result = 3 + 84.5
print "3 + 84.5 = {result}"

print "--- aggregation ---"
total = entries | map .num | sum
print "names: {entries | map .name | join ', '}"
print "total: {total}"
avg = total.float / entries.len.float
print "average: {avg}"

print "--- match with err ---"
tests = [42, 84, 85, 100, 10]
for val in tests {
  outcome = match (check val) {
    err e -> "rejected {val}: {e}",
    int n -> "accepted {n}"
  }
  print outcome
}
```

records = lines.lines | map ln -> {
  parts = ln.split " "
  name = parts[0]
  num = parts[1].int ? 0
  {name, num}
}

for g in records.group .name {
  total = g.v | map .num | sum
  print "{g.k}: {total}"
}

grand = records | map .num | sum
print "total: {grand}"

items = [
  {label: "apple", score: 3, active: true},
  {label: "banana", score: 7, active: false},
  {label: "cherry", score: 5, active: true},
  {label: "date", score: 9, active: true},
  {label: "elderberry", score: 2, active: false}
]

result = items | keep .active | map x -> "{x.label}({x.score})" | join ", "
print "active items: {result}"

top_score = items | keep .active | top 1 .score | map .label | join ""
print "top active: {top_score}"
```
